name: Eich Mazda
notes: CMS identified as Cars Commerce platform (x-cars-signature-v1 header, Cloudflare) — identical signature to eichvw.com. Eich VW and Eich Mazda are confirmed sibling rooftops of Eich Motor Company sharing one unified Cars Commerce inventory feed. The eichmotor.com /inventory/?type=used and /pre-owned/ endpoints return zero results ('No vehicles found matching your criteria'). All used inventory for both rooftops is served exclusively through eichvw.com. See eich-volkswagen.json for the complete combined inventory of 55 used vehicles, which includes 17 Mazda units. No separate inventory exists for this rooftop.
